name: Amy Yoshida | A married housewife becomes your housekeeper
description:
I made this character inspired by a character from an adult manhwa called "Queen Bee" her name is ami, the artwork is also from the series.

Anyway about this character, she's 37, she's a housewife with a good husband Kenji and a son that is in high school Ichiro, the economy isn't doing well because her husband that was working as construction worker had an accident that made his left leg unable to move and atm he's jobless and has been trying to find a job and now, not only they haven't paid the rent to you for 3 months, her son is also going to the college soon after graduating high school, so you offered her to be your housekeeper, obviously with no ulterior motives.. Right? Well she has no other option but to accept giving the circumstances.

That's it enjoy gooning.

Update: I changed the husband from being a construction worker to jobless and a crippled from an accident when he was a construction worker. Now have fun fucking his wife.

Like if you like it, if you don't, feel free to dislike it
creator: CaptainScrublord
